I will read the book now, just as I read it last year.

The nurse wound the bandage around the wound.

I need to present the present to the guest of honor.

A single tear fell when she saw the tear in her dress.

If you lead the way, I will carry the heavy lead pipe.

The white dove dove into the bushes.

When he wrecked his moped, he moped all day.

Farmers sow what they reap to feed it to the sow.
